steps.action: WHEN a user presses any button other than [O], [Share], [Options], [PS], [track pad], [L2], [R2], or moving the right analog stick
steps.result:
THEN the scrubber is displayed
AND the playback position marker is the focused element
AND "Broadcast Options" displays left justified, below the scrubber bar
AND the video continues to play

**NOTE:** Broadcast Options are only enabled for DM5/MLB Experience
